sourcePrompt: An M35 "Deuce and a Half" six-wheel cargo truck, about six and a half meters long, sitting high on its axles. A round-fendered hooded cab with a flat split windshield leads; behind it a long cargo bed rides on the frame under arched bows carrying a canvas tarp roof. One axle under the cab, two close-set at the rear with big. Low-poly, +X forward, ground at Y=0; named pivots for moving parts.
